audience: Independent experts, executives, managers and employee teams needing consistent professional portraits for digital and print communications.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Professionele zakelijke portretten laten maken die personen geloofwaardig, benaderbaar en als één samenhangend team presenteren.

searchIntent.question: Who can photograph natural, consistent business portraits for our website, LinkedIn profiles and corporate communications?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Limburg, Belgium, with on-location sessions across Flanders, Antwerp and Dutch Limburg.

directAnswer: Business portrait photography creates a consistent yet personal series for websites, LinkedIn and corporate publications through planned lighting, suitable backgrounds, individual direction and natural finishing.
title: Business Portraits for Teams in Limburg | VisualVibe
metaDescription: Professional portraits for websites and LinkedIn, with calm direction, appropriate lighting and consistent finishing for independent experts, executives and teams.
h1: Business portraits that feel professional and personal
factsToPreserve: On-location sessions require enough suitable space for the background, lighting and camera distance.
Matching portraits of future employees depends on reproducing the background, lighting, camera position and finishing.
Natural retouching retains normal skin texture and personal features unless a different finish is agreed before the session.
The number of selections, crops, high-resolution files and intended applications are agreed in advance.
Price depends on participants, settings, variations, preparation, adjustments, retouching and exports.
